data.title: Indian authorities arrest alleged Garantex founder for US extradition
data.description:
Officials with India’s Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI) announced the arrest of Lithuanian national Aleksej Bešciokov, who was alleged to have operated the cryptocurrency exchange Garantex. In a March 12 notice, the CBI said police in the Indian state of Kerala had coordinated with national authorities to arrest Bešciokov. The Lithuanian national was reportedly vacationing in India with...
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/india-arrest-aleksej-besciokov-garantex?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Trump announces response to EU's retaliatory tariffs
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: US President Trump announced that he would respond to the EU's counter-tariffs. There will be flexibility on the tariff issue, but once it starts, the flexibility will be very limited. April 2 will be a very important day. (Jinshi)

data.title: DeFi trader hit by MEV attack swapped 440K USDC for just 10K USDT
data.description:
While the affected transactions come from distinct addresses, their transaction histories suggest they are from the same individual.
The post DeFi trader hit by MEV attack swapped 440K USDC for just 10K USDT appeared first on Protos.
source: https://protos.com/defi-trader-hit-by-mev-attack-swapped-440k-usdc-for-just-10k-usdt/

data.title: Hyperliquid liquidation address closed the 160,000 ETH long position of the “50x leverage whale”, resulting in a loss of $3.23 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst Yu Jin, it took 7 hours of continuous small-amount liquidation, and Hyperliquid's liquidation address finally closed the 160,000 ETH long position (US$306 million) taken over from the "50x leverage whale on Hyperliquid". It took over at US$1,915 and closed at an average price of US$1,895. The HLP vault eventually lost US$3.23 million to digest the 160,000 ETH long position.

data.title: ALR Miner Lead Earn up to $28,800 with Solana
data.description:
The passage of SIMD-228 marks Solana’s transition from fixed inflation to a market-driven model, solving the problems of excessive inflation and insufficient incentives. Compared with Ethereum’s destruction mechanism and Sui’s static inflation, Solana’s dynamic design is more flexible, but it still needs ecological feedback optimization. The market may be volatile in the short term, but ......
source: https://crypto-economy.com/alr-miner-lead-earn-up-to-28800-with-solana/

data.title: U.S. To Respond To EU's Counter-Tariffs
data.description: According to BlockBeats, U.S. President Donald Trump announced on March 13 that the United States will respond to the European Union's counter-tariffs. This statement highlights ongoing trade tensions between the U.S. and the EU.

data.title: Venice airdrop ends, $100 million worth of unclaimed VVV tokens destroyed
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Venice, a privacy-focused artificial intelligence platform, has completed the airdrop process and destroyed unclaimed VVV tokens worth about $100 million. It is reported that since the airdrop began in January, more than 40,000 participants have received more than 17.4 million VVV tokens, and 32.6 million unclaimed VVVs account for 65% of the community's allocation. (Theblock)

data.title: US SEC again delays decision on Grayscale spot Ethereum ETF options approval
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to market news, the U.S. SEC has once again delayed its decision on the approval of Grayscale's spot Ethereum ETF options.

data.title: Modular blockchain network Hemi mainnet launched
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The modular blockchain network Hemi announced that its mainnet has been launched. Hemi completed a US$15 million seed round of financing in September 2024, with participation from institutions such as Binance Labs, Breyer Capital and Big Brain Holdings.
